title: bridge-jmap: seen_ids resets on restart (same as nie-y9mn.5)
description: bridge-jmap/src/bridge.rs: SeenIds is in-memory. On restart, all previously-seen JMAP email IDs are lost, so the next poll re-processes the last 50 emails. This was previously filed as nie-y9mn.5 for JMAP specifically. Confirming this issue exists in bridge-jmap as expected.
close_reason: seen_ids persisted to disk; bounded to last 1000 IDs; atomic write-then-rename; restart no longer causes re-delivery
